title: Generated executor build-green rollback complete
body: Moonless Vanishing Lantern completed the agreed narrow rollback on main-critical-sonar-remediation. Updated plan/thread/napkin/comms first to record owner decision: generated files stay inside quality scanning. Then rolled back only the generic invoker-map generator abstraction, preserved unrelated generator fixes, ran pnpm --filter @oaknational/sdk-codegen sdk-codegen (PASS) and pnpm --filter @oaknational/sdk-codegen build (PASS). Pausing here per owner direction; fresh session should solve the remaining generated runtime/execute.ts cognitive-complexity issue with a generator-owned literal-preserving shape, not generated-file exclusion or core MCP type broadening.
